basic_details.job_title: NCPOR Recruitment 2026 - Walk in for 06 Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Centre for Polar & Ocean Research (NCPOR)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) & Senior Research Fellow (SRF)

important_dates.raw: Walk-in Interview Date: 09 July 2026 (Thursday) Registration Time: 08:30 AM to 10:30 AM

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree with NET/GATE (JRF) Master’s with 2 years experience + Publication (SRF)
qualification.details: Qualification (JRF): Master’s degree in relevant subjects (Geology, Geophysics, Marine Science, Oceanography, Chemistry etc.) or Bachelor’s in Engineering/Technology with at least 60% marks + CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualified. Qualification (SRF): Master’s degree in relevant subjects with at least 55% marks + One SCI publication + Two years post-Master’s research experience. Desirable: Relevant research experience, programming skills (Python, MATLAB, Fortran etc.), field work experience. Age Limit (as on 09 July 2026): Maximum 28 years for JRF and 32 years for SRF. Age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA SRF: Rs. 42,000/- + HRA
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Report for Walk-in Interview on 09 July 2026 between 08:30 AM to 10:30 AM.
Bring duly filled application form (Annexure-I) with recent passport size photograph.
Carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies for verification.
Venue: National Centre for Polar & Ocean Research, Headland Sada, Vasco-da-Gama, Goa - 403 804.
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary on contract basis under project mode (initially for 1 year). No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring all original documents and one set of self-attested copies. OBC candidates must bring valid NCL certificate. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular absorption in NCPOR.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for NCPOR JRF and SRF posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 09 July 2026 (Thursday) with registration from 08:30 AM to 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 6 vacancies - 4 for Junior Research Fellow and 2 for Senior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow at NCPOR Goa?
Q4. What is the age limit for JRF positions in NCPOR?
faq.answer: Not exceeding 28 years as on 09 July 2026 (relaxation as per rules).

faq.question: Q5. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for NCPOR JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE along with Master’s degree.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 09 July 2026 (Thursday) with registration from 08:30 AM to 10:30 AM.

title: NCPOR Recruitment 2026 - Walk in for 06 Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Posts
